bug_report.summary: LSP Server port input control renders with an extra small empty box / fragmented right border
steps_to_reproduce: Scroll down to the server section (below “HTTP Server”)
Look at the port field next to “Enable LSP Server on port” (or triple-click inside it)
expected_behaviors: Only the wording changes to “LSP Server”; the port input should remain a single, cleanly rendered textbox with consistent border/shape
actual_behaviors: The port input area shows an extra small empty boxed area / fragmented right-side border next to the port value, making it look like the field is split or misrendered

false_positive_reasons: LLM hallucination — misinterpreted or imagined GUI rendering
